# CalcFuel

> Free online calculators for marketing, finance, email, and social media. No sign-up required. Instant results.

CalcFuel provides accurate, free calculators built for marketers, business owners, and analysts. Every calculator includes formula explanations, industry benchmarks, and actionable interpretation of results.

## Calculators

### Email Marketing
- [Email Open Rate Calculator](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/email-open-rate-calculator/): Calculate the percentage of subscribers who opened your email campaign. Includes benchmarks by industry.

### Marketing ROI
- [Marketing ROI Calculator](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/marketing-roi-calculator/): Calculate return on marketing investment. Inputs: revenue generated, marketing cost. Outputs: ROI %, net profit.
- [ROAS Calculator](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/roas-calculator/): Calculate Return on Ad Spend. Inputs: revenue from ads, ad spend. Output: ROAS multiplier (e.g. 4.2x).
- [Ad Spend Calculator](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/ad-spend-calculator/): Full ad budget planner. Inputs: budget, CPC, conversion rate, deal value. Outputs: clicks, leads, revenue, ROI, ROAS.

### Social Media
- [Social Media ROI Calculator](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/social-media-roi-calculator/): Calculate ROI of social media ad campaigns. Inputs: ad spend, revenue. Output: ROI %.

## Category Hubs
- [Email Marketing Calculators](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/email-marketing/)
- [Financial Calculators](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/financial/)
- [Social Media Calculators](https://calcfuel.com/calculators/social-media/)

## About
- All calculators are free, no account required
- Results are instant, calculated client-side
- No data is stored or transmitted
